info.title: PizzaHap API
info.description:
Complete REST API for PizzaHap pizza ordering system.

## Authentication Flow
1. `POST /auth/send-otp` — sends 6-digit OTP to email via Gmail/Nodemailer
2. `POST /auth/register` (new users) or `POST /auth/login` (returning users) — verify OTP, receive `accessToken` + `refreshToken`
3. Pass `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>` on all protected routes
4. Access token expires in 7 days (`JWT_EXPIRES_IN`). Refresh token lasts 30 days.
5. Use `POST /auth/refresh-token` to rotate both tokens before expiry

## Admin Authentication
- `POST /admin/auth/login` with `email` + `password` → 12-hour admin JWT
- Same `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header
- Roles: `super_admin`, `admin`, `staff`

## Response Envelope
All responses:
```json
{ "success": true|false, "message": "...", "data": {} }
```
Paginated responses also include:
```json
"pagination": { "total": 100, "page": 1, "limit": 20, "totalPages": 5, "hasNext": true, "hasPrev": false }
```

## Base URL
`http://13.232.73.121/api`

BearerAuth.description: User JWT (7-day) from /auth/login or /auth/register. Admin JWT (12-hour) from /admin/auth/login.

distance_km.description: Only present when lat/lng query params passed

ProductSummary.description: Returned in list and featured endpoints (no sizes/crusts/toppings/reviews)

ProductDetail.description: Full product from GET /menu/products/:id — includes sizes (product-specific), crusts (all global), toppings (all global), up to 5 reviews

reviews.description: Up to 5 most recent approved reviews

coupon.description: Full coupon row if coupon_code was applied

OrderSummary.description: Returned in the list endpoint — no items/history/payment sub-objects

payment.description: null if no payment record yet

Coupon.description: Shape returned by GET /coupons — public fields only

calculated_discount.description: Actual rupee discount for the given order_value

sender_name.description: Resolved from Users or Admins table via CASE JOIN

PayUParams.description: Pass these fields directly to PayU Flutter/JS SDK

pending_orders.description: Count of orders in pending | confirmed | preparing

period.description: DATE | WEEK number | YYYY-MM depending on period param

post.description: Generates 6-digit OTP, invalidates any prior unused OTP for same email+type, stores in OtpTokens, emails via Gmail. Response masks email (e.g. jo****@gmail.com).

200.description: OTP sent — message includes masked email

post.summary: Resend OTP (generates a fresh OTP, invalidates previous)

post.description: Verifies OTP (DB-based, with attempt limit and expiry), checks email uniqueness, inserts User with is_verified=1, issues accessToken + refreshToken (stored in RefreshTokens table).

400.description: Invalid/expired OTP (includes reason: 'Too many attempts' if ≥5 wrong tries)

post.description: Verifies OTP, checks user exists and is not blocked/deactivated, updates last_login, issues token pair (new refresh token stored in RefreshTokens).

404.description: Email not registered — must register first

post.description: Verifies refreshToken JWT signature and checks it exists in RefreshTokens with expires_at > NOW(). Deletes old token, inserts new pair. Both tokens are rotated.

401.description: Invalid JWT or token not found/expired in DB — user must re-login

post.summary: Logout — delete refresh token from DB
post.description: If refreshToken is provided, deletes it from RefreshTokens. Always returns 200 (best-effort).

get.description: Returns full user row LEFT JOINed with Locations to get preferred_location_name.

put.description: All fields optional. Uses IFNULL(?, col) so only provided non-null fields are changed. email cannot be changed (it is the login identifier).

get.description: Returns all with is_active=1 ordered by name. If latitude+longitude provided, adds distance_km (Haversine) and sorts nearest-first.
Without coordinates returns first active location. With lat/lng returns single nearest location + distance_km.
WHERE is_active=1, ordered by sort_order. No auth required.
WHERE is_available=1, with optional filters. Ordered by sort_order then name. No auth required.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: LIKE match on name OR description

get.description: WHERE is_featured=1 AND is_available=1, ordered by sort_order, LIMIT 10. No auth required.

Returns product + sizes (product-specific, available only) + ALL globally available crusts + ALL globally available toppings + up to 5 most recent approved reviews + avg_rating + review_count. No auth required.

404.description: Product not found or not available

get.description: WHERE is_available=1, optional is_veg filter, ordered by sort_order. No auth required.
WHERE is_available=1, ordered by sort_order. No auth required.

post.summary: Calculate order total (preview — no records created)
post.description: Looks up size prices, crust extra_price, topping prices. Applies coupon discount. delivery_fee = 40 if subtotal < 300 AND delivery_type=delivery, else 0. tax = 5% of (subtotal - discount + delivery_fee). Auth required.

400.description: Invalid size/crust/topping ID, or coupon invalid/expired/min order not met

post.description: Full DB transaction: validates items, calculates totals, inserts Orders + OrderItems + OrderItemToppings + OrderStatusHistory (status=pending). If coupon used: increments used_count, inserts UserCouponUsage. Returns order_id, order_number, total_amount. Call POST /payments/create-order next to process payment.

400.description: Product unavailable, invalid size, coupon issues, min order not met

get.description: Scoped to req.user.id. Optional status filter. Newest first. Joined with location_name.
Returns order + items (each item has toppings array) + status_history (ASC) + payment (nullable). Scoped to req.user.id.

404.description: Order not found or belongs to another user

post.description: Allowed only when status IN ('pending','confirmed'). Sets status=cancelled, writes cancellation_reason, cancellation_time, cancelled_by='user'. Inserts OrderStatusHistory row.

400.description: Cannot cancel at this stage (not pending/confirmed)

post.summary: Get cart items from a previous order
post.description: Returns items array with product_id, size_id, crust_id, quantity, special_instructions, and toppings (array of IDs). Ready to pass directly to POST /orders. Does NOT create any new order.

404.description: Order not found or no items

post.summary: Initiate payment for a placed order
post.description:
COD: inserts Payments(status=pending), updates Orders.status=confirmed, inserts OrderStatusHistory. Returns HTTP 200.

PayU: generates txnid + SHA-512 hash, inserts Payments(status=pending), returns HTTP 201 with full payu_params. Pass payu_params to PayU Flutter SDK. Fields razorpay_order_id (=txnid) and key_id (=PAYU_MERCHANT_KEY) are legacy aliases.

404.description: Order not found or already paid (payment_status != pending)

post.summary: Verify PayU payment after SDK callback
post.description: Verifies reverse SHA-512 hash (SALT|status|...|key). On success: updates Payments(status=captured), Orders(payment_status=paid, status=confirmed), inserts OrderStatusHistory.

404.description: Payment record not found for given txnid

post.description: Configure as both surl and furl in PayU dashboard. Receives application/x-www-form-urlencoded. Verifies hash. status=success → Payments(captured) + Orders(confirmed). status=failure|failed → Payments(failed). Also aliased at /payments/razorpay-webhook.

Eligible if order.status IN ('cancelled','delivered') AND payment_status='paid'. Must have gateway_payment_id (no COD refunds via API — handled manually). Only one non-failed refund allowed per order.

400.description: Not eligible, already requested, or COD order

get.description: Joins Orders for order_number. Ordered by requested_at DESC.
WHERE is_active=1 AND within valid_from..valid_until AND (usage_limit IS NULL OR used_count < usage_limit). Returns code, description, discount_type, discount_value, min_order_value, valid_until.

post.summary: Validate a coupon + get calculated discount
post.description: Checks: active, validity window, global usage limit, per-user usage (UserCouponUsage table). Returns calculated_discount = rupee discount for the given order_value.

400.description: Invalid/expired, min order not met, or per-user limit exceeded

post.description: Only for delivered orders belonging to the user. Prevents duplicate (order_id + user_id + product_id) via conflict check.

400.description: Order not delivered or not owned by user

409.description: Already rated this product for this order

get.description: WHERE is_approved=1 for the product, ordered newest first. Computes avg_rating. No auth required.
WHERE user_id=req.user.id, ordered newest first, LIMIT 50. Returns notifications array + unread_count.

put.description: UPDATE Notifications SET is_read=1 WHERE user_id=? AND is_read=0

post.description: Inserts SupportTickets row (ticket_number = TKT-{8-digit timestamp suffix}) + opening SupportMessages row with sender_role='user'.

get.description: Scoped to req.user.id. Joins Orders for order_number. Optional status filter. Newest first.
Scoped to req.user.id. Messages ordered ASC. sender_name resolved via CASE: Users table for sender_role='user', Admins table otherwise.

404.description: Ticket not found or belongs to another user

post.description: Inserts SupportMessages with sender_role='user'. Sets ticket status='in_progress'. Fails if ticket status='closed'.

404.description: Ticket not found, closed, or not owned by user

post.description: bcrypt compare against Admins.password_hash. JWT payload: {id, type:'admin', role}. Expires 12h. Updates last_login. Strips password_hash from response.

get.description: Parallel queries: today orders+revenue (paid only), total all-time revenue, new users today, pending order count, top 5 products by order_count (paid orders).
Grouping: daily=DATE(created_at), weekly=WEEK(created_at), monthly=DATE_FORMAT('%Y-%m'). Returns total_orders, revenue, delivered, cancelled per period.
Optional filters: status, location_id. Joins Users (user_name, user_mobile) and Locations (location_name). Newest first.

put.summary: Update order status with transition validation
put.description:
Valid transitions enforced:
- pending → confirmed | cancelled
- confirmed → preparing | cancelled
- preparing → out_for_delivery | cancelled
- out_for_delivery → delivered
- delivered → refund_requested
- cancelled → (none)

Inserts OrderStatusHistory row with changed_by_role='admin'.

400.description: Invalid transition (e.g. delivered → confirmed not allowed)

get.description: Joins Orders + Users + Locations. Items fetched with GROUP_CONCAT of topping names. CGST = SGST = tax_amount/2. Not scoped to user — admin can view any order.
Optional search (LIKE on name, email, mobile), is_blocked filter. Returns: id, name, email, mobile, is_verified, is_active, is_blocked, created_at, last_login. Newest first.

put.description: Requires super_admin or admin role (checked by requireRole middleware). Sets is_blocked=1 or 0.

403.description: Insufficient role — must be admin or super_admin

post.description: Requires super_admin or admin role. Inserts into Products. If sizes array provided, inserts ProductSizes rows. Returns product_id.

put.description: Requires super_admin or admin role. All fields optional via IFNULL. Booleans (is_veg, is_featured, is_available) must be explicitly passed as true/false.

delete.description: Requires super_admin or admin role. Does NOT hard-delete. Sets is_available=0 so the product disappears from all GET /menu/products queries.

post.description: Requires super_admin or admin role. code is uppercased. max_discount only relevant for percentage type to cap rupee value.

get.description: Optional status filter. Joins Orders (order_number) and Users (user_name, user_email). Ordered by requested_at DESC.

post.summary: Approve or reject a pending refund
post.description:
Requires super_admin or admin role. Only works on status=pending.

reject: sets status=failed, records processed_by, notes.

approve: calls PayU cancel_refund_transaction API (gets OAuth2 token first), sets status=processing, updates Orders.payment_status=refunded.

404.description: Refund not found or already processed (not pending)

get.summary: Get all support tickets (admin view, paginated)
get.description: Optional filters: status, priority. Joins Users (user_name, user_email) and Orders (order_number). Ordered by priority DESC then created_at ASC.

post.summary: Reply to a ticket as admin
post.description: Inserts SupportMessages with sender_role='admin', sender_id=req.admin.id. Optional status update — if resolved or closed, also sets resolved_at=NOW().

status.description: Optional — update ticket status alongside reply
